title: Shared-Use Path Design Details — Crosswalks, Safety Beacons, and Streetscape Integration
summary: Detailed design discussion of the RTC area mobility project. Key concerns: no traffic light funding at Carbon/Hiawatha crosswalk (TAP grant restricts to pedestrian/bike only, no vehicular improvements), but flashing beacons may be added for safety. Parks department will be engaged for street trees and canopy coverage. Council members raise snow removal for shared-use paths and green infrastructure design for stormwater management. Shared-use path dimensions vary: 10-foot where right-of-way allows, 5-foot sidewalk in constrained areas. Discussion of bike/pedestrian lane markings and prevention of vehicles parking on paths. Burn Dairy proposed new store at Park/NBT intersection could increase local traffic.
